_note: v8.3.31 re-fire. The first pull (sample-2026-05-12.json) got only 10K trades per ticker (~3 min of market) because fetch_alpaca_ticks.py didn't paginate. v8.3.31 fixes that via next_page_token iteration. This trigger re-pulls 2026-05-12 with the fix. Expected: ~30-45 min runtime, ~1-3 GB compressed tick data. On completion, tick-atr-validation auto-fires and writes tick-atr/2026-05-12/summary.json to the tick-validation-results branch.
